productDisplayName: Puma Men Track Cat Black Casual Shoe
description: Very stylish fashion footwear from puma. The genuine leather adds sophistication to these casual shoes which, along with the high-visibility silver stripe on each side, means this shoe can be worn as daywear or partywear. Upper Leather upper with synthetic fabric detailing Lace-ups for a snug Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Brand logo on the tongue and heel Midsole Made of environment friendly Eco Ortholite midsole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties and long term cushioning Outsole TPR outsole for absolute grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
